Search LMT-Atlas

Search enzyme/construct names, species, UniProt, PDB, EC, DOI, patent number. GenBank/NCBI protein accession support is planned.

HomeBrowse EnzymesBrowse by OrganismSearchAnalysisDocumentationGlossaryAbout
Continuous LTS_ref primary. Public pages use the frozen LTS_ref score with a 95% interval and a confidence badge as the main tolerance summary. Lower LTS_ref means more methanol tolerant. Internal archive fields remain available in CSV and SQLite downloads for reproducibility.
lower = more tolerantmore tolerantless tolerant

Comparable Subset Filters

Because assay conditions are heterogeneous, filter by temperature, method, concentration, time, evidence tier, fit status, source type, and structural family before comparing entries.

Advanced filters

Export Wizard

Export current filtered result as CSV after choosing a machine-learning view. Continuous mode keeps the official frozen LTS fields. Tiered mode derives temporary labels from the current subset using preregistered thresholds plus sorted LTS_ref quantiles.

Conservative mode is on by default: when the 95% interval crosses a tier boundary, confidence is low, or the ranking is unstable, the tiered export marks the entry as unclear (or slight/unclear-safe for the 5-level scheme) rather than forcing a tolerant/fragile call.

Reverse-mutation augmentation adds, for each wild-type/variant pair, a second machine-learning row representing the reverse mutation with a negated tolerance difference. Intended for model training; exact column definitions are in the data dictionary.

Enzymes / Constructs

Sources

No results

No database entry matches this enzyme or query. Try enzyme names, construct names, species, UniProt IDs, PDB IDs, EC numbers, DOI, or patent publication numbers. GenBank/NCBI accession search is planned for a later schema update.

Result States

No matching entryNo database entry matches this enzyme or query
Identity without challenge dataIdentity known, but no methanol challenge data are linked yet
Unstable evidenceEvidence exists, but it is not strong enough for a stable tolerance verdict
Stable verdictRobust tolerance or fragility verdict available
